message: Try an oat, almond, soy, or coconut-based dairy alternative.
Look for egg-free products using flax, aquafaba, or plant binders.
Choose a plant-based protein version made with soy, pea, mushroom, or lentils.
Try seaweed-seasoned plant alternatives when a product uses fish or seafood.
Pick a product that clearly labels plant-derived additives.
Choose brands that disclose vegan-certified flavor sources.
Try a lower-sugar version or a product sweetened with fruit.
